zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Byron於1280年出生在英國素可克雷頓時，他的父親John de Byron27歲，母親Alice de Banastre8歲。他和Agnes of Clayton至少有2個兒子。他去世於1346年7月6日享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Byron于1280年出生在英国素可克雷頓时，他的父亲John de Byron27岁，母亲Alice de Banastre8岁。他和Agnes of Clayton至少有2个儿子。他去世于1346年7月6日享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Byron was born in 1280, in Clayton, Sussex, England, his father, John de Byron, was 27 and his mother, Alice de Banastre, was 8. He had at least 2 sons with Agnes of Clayton. He died on 6 July 1346, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Byron est né en 1280, à Clayton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Byron, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice de Banastre, avait 8 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Agnes of Clayton. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1346, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Byron 1280 in Clayton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Byron 27 und seine Mutter Alice de Banastre 8. Er hatte mit Agnes of Clayton mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 6. Juli 1346 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Byron è nato il nel 1280 nel Clayton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Byron, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Banastre, aveva 8 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Agnes of Clayton. Morì il 6 luglio 1346, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Byronが1280年にイギリススセックスクレイトンで生まれた時，父John de Byronは27歳，母Alice de Banastreは8歳であった。彼はAgnes of Claytonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1346年7月6日に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Byron(이)가 1280년 영국 수세스 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Byron(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Banastre(은)는 8세였다. 그는 Agnes of Clayton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 7월 6일 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Byron nasceu em 1280, em Clayton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Byron, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Banastre, tinha 8 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Agnes of Clayton. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1346, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Byron родился в 1280 г. в местности клеитон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Byron было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Banastre, 8. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Agnes of Clayton. Он умер 6 июля 1346 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Byron nació en 1280, en Clayton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Byron, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice de Banastre, tenía 8 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Agnes of Clayton. Murió el 6 de julio de 1346, a la edad de 66 años.
